rule.desc: Pick collections based on access patterns and size.
rule.rationale: The wrong collection can cause hot-path bottlenecks.

example.code: // Good - fast lookups Map<OrderId, Order> index = new HashMap<>();

rule.desc: Use `StringBuilder` for repeated concatenation in loops.
Use streams for clear, side-effect-free pipelines. Prefer loops in hot paths.
rule.rationale: Streams improve readability but can add overhead.

rule.desc: Use primitive types and primitive streams in tight loops.
rule.rationale: Boxing creates allocation and GC pressure.
Most performance issues are not where you expect.

example.code: Use JFR or async-profiler to find hotspots before changing code.
